message:
fix: WASM concurrency mutex, O(n²) lookups, puppeteer cleanup

- layout.ts: add promise-based mutex around WASM calls to prevent
  heap corruption from concurrent HTTP requests sharing bump allocator
- layout.ts: guard loadWasm() against double initialization
- sdk.ts: replace O(n²) .find() in computeChangeSummary with Map lookup
- sdk.ts: replace array.includes() with Set.has() in group/frame loops
- png.ts: clean up temp userDataDir when browser.launch() fails
- sdk-types.ts: add missing RenderResult fields (warnings, changeSummary,
  stats) and update icon presets list to match actual 22 icons
